info.name: Ecom Engine - Catalog (Bulk)
info.description: Postman collection for testing the product bulk management endpoints of the ecom-engine API.

request.description: Creates multiple products along with their variants in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.
Updates multiple existing products and their variants in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.
Deletes multiple products simultaneously by their IDs in a single API request. Requires authenticated admin token.
